title: Excalibur | Inventory HUD+ Support
description: Excalibur support for Inventory HUD+ mod
body:
This is a support pack that makes the textures from the [Inventory HUD+](https://modrinth.com/mod/inventoryhudplus) mod match the medieval style of [Excalibur](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/excal).

Note: ignore incompatibility warning for this pack. This is just because of the pack format value, which doesn't matter for this specific pack.

### **Features:**
- Retexture of all backgrounds
- Retexture of all icons (except for main hand slot icon)
- Retexture of config screen

### **Showcase:**
![HUD](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e69aa156dea65c0e7d32ee12aa52d8d50ca52fe3.png)

![Potion Background](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/24f3def2d9c4d72f215a73e58aac7752db0d1dec_0.webp)

![Icons](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b505c0d9abf5ae576b0c1ab0c9a130936c1dae03.png)

### **Credit:**
- _Maffhew_ - Author of the resourcepack [Excalibur](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/excal)
- _dmitrylovin_ - Author of the mod [Inventory HUD+](https://modrinth.com/mod/inventoryhudplus)
